variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of goods sold appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to selling, administrative, or other operating overhead appears in the operating section above financial lines. With XSGA_COMPONENTS already selected as 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses', and no separate operating D&A line shown, D&A is assumed embedded in those selected rows, so nothing should be added separately.
